name: 🥉🦐"Out of signal and out of hope."🦐🥉
description:
~★☆"I've reached the point, point, point Where I beat the bank, bank after bank If luck is on my side It's a win, win, win How much do I have, how much, how much? Let me count while I combo Damn, if the house never loses I buy, buy, buy the house Bet! Bet! Bet!(Again!) Bet! Bet! Bet!(Again!)Lost? Double the amount And then bet, bet, bet(Bet!)Bet! Bet! Bet!(Bet!) I trust my luck So we double, double, double (Let's go!)"☆★~
